benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.description: $15/month in Uber Cash ($35 in December)
benefits.redeemTip: Automatically added to linked Uber account each month

benefits.name: Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.description: $20/month for select streaming (Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, NYT, etc.)
benefits.redeemTip: Pay for an eligible streaming subscription with your Platinum card

benefits.name: Walmart+ Membership
benefits.description: $12.95/month Walmart+ membership credit
benefits.redeemTip: Enroll in Walmart+ and pay with your Platinum card

benefits.name: Equinox+ Credit
benefits.description: Up to $25/month Equinox+ digital fitness credit
benefits.redeemTip: Subscribe to Equinox+ and pay with your Platinum card

benefits.name: Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
benefits.description: $50 semi-annual Saks credit (Jan–Jun / Jul–Dec)
benefits.redeemTip: Shop at Saks Fifth Avenue (online or in-store) with your Platinum card

benefits.name: Resy Dining Credit
benefits.description: $50 semi-annual dining credit at Resy restaurants (Jan–Jun / Jul–Dec)
benefits.redeemTip: Dine at a Resy restaurant and pay with your Platinum card

benefits.name: Airline Fee Credit
benefits.description: $200/year airline incidental fee credit
benefits.redeemTip: Select an airline in your Amex account, then use card for incidental fees (bags, seats, etc.)

benefits.name: FHR / Hotel Collection Credit
benefits.description: $200/year Fine Hotels + Resorts or Hotel Collection credit
benefits.redeemTip: Book through Amex Travel using FHR or The Hotel Collection

benefits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit

benefits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck
benefits.description: $100 every 4.5 years for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck

benefits.redeemTip: Apply for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck and pay with your Platinum card
